name: Minnesota Welcome Center & Rest Area (Beaver Creek)
description: 24-hour MnDOT welcome/travel information center and rest area on eastbound I-90 at the South Dakota state line near Beaver Creek (Exit 1), with restrooms, vending, tourist info and auto/truck parking.

name: Adrian Rest Area
description: MnDOT safety rest area on I-90 near Adrian (westbound MM 25 / eastbound MM 24) between Luverne and Worthington, with restrooms and auto/truck parking.

name: Casey's General Store - Luverne
description: Casey's fuel and convenience store at I-90 Exit 12 (US-75) in Luverne with diesel, a deli/pizza, restrooms and limited truck parking.

name: Casey's #3263 - Worthington
description: Casey's at I-90 Exit 43 (US-59) in Worthington with 24-hour diesel, a convenience store/deli, Wi-Fi and limited truck parking.

name: Worthington Travel Plaza
description: Full-service travel center at I-90 Exit 45 (Hwy 60) in Worthington with 24-hour diesel, showers, laundry, a restaurant/deli, CAT Scale, tires, DOT inspections and a truck/trailer wash.

name: CAT Scale at Worthington Travel Plaza
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Worthington Travel Plaza at I-90 and Hwy 60 (Exit 45) in Worthington; open to trucks 24/7.

name: Blue Line Travel Center
description: Independent travel center at I-90 Exit 45 in Worthington with 24-hour diesel, a 24-hour restaurant, showers, laundry, scales, tires and a truck/trailer wash.

name: Worthington Weigh Station
description: MnDOT / MN State Patrol commercial-vehicle weigh scale on I-90 about a half-mile east of Worthington, operated by State Patrol Commercial Vehicle Enforcement.

name: Vet's Whoa N Go
description: Truck stop at I-90 Exit 73 (US-71) in Jackson with 24-hour diesel, showers, a restaurant/deli, tires, towing and mechanic/mobile repair.

name: Casey's General Store - Sherburn
description: Casey's with diesel at I-90 Exit 87 (MN-4) in Sherburn with a convenience store, deli/pizza and restrooms.

name: Kwik Trip #424 - Fairmont
description: Kwik Trip at I-90 Exit 102 (MN-15) in Fairmont with 24-hour diesel, food and limited truck parking.

name: Kwik Trip #646 - Blue Earth
description: Kwik Trip at I-90 Exit 119 (US-169) in Blue Earth with 24-hour diesel, a convenience store and limited truck parking.

name: Blue Earth Auto/Truck Stop
description: Independent auto/truck stop at I-90 Exit 119 in Blue Earth with 24-hour diesel, showers, a deli, motel, reefer plug-ins and a truck wash.

name: Blue Earth Rest Area
description: MnDOT safety rest area on I-90 near mile marker 119 by Blue Earth (both directions) with restrooms and auto/truck parking.

name: Trail's Travel Center (Petro / TA Truck Service)
description: Large Petro/TA-branded travel center at the I-90/I-35 junction (I-35 Exit 11) in Albert Lea with about 300 truck spaces, multiple diesel lanes, showers, laundry, a restaurant, CAT Scale, TA Truck Service (tires/alignment), a truck wash and Wi-Fi.

name: CAT Scale at Trail's Travel Center Albert Lea
description: Certified CAT Scale at Trail's Travel Center / Petro at the I-90/I-35 junction (Exit 11) in Albert Lea; open 24/7.

name: Love's Travel Stop #337
description: Love's Travel Stop at the I-90/I-35 junction (I-35 Exit 11) in Albert Lea with 24-hour diesel (8 lanes), about 66 truck spaces, showers, a CAT Scale, restaurant and Wi-Fi.

name: CAT Scale at Love's Albert Lea
description: Certified CAT Scale at Love's Travel Stop #337 at the I-90/I-35 junction (Exit 11) in Albert Lea.

name: Trail's Semi Truck Wash - Albert Lea
description: Full tractor and trailer wash (high-pressure undercarriage, brighteners, wax, tire shine) at Trail's Travel Center / Petro on E Main St near the I-90/I-35 junction in Albert Lea.

name: T&W Towing
description: 24/7 heavy-duty towing, semi-truck recovery and mobile tire service based in Albert Lea, serving the I-90/I-35 corridor (also Owatonna, MN and Northwood, IA).

name: Dean's Towing - Albert Lea
description: 24-hour towing and roadside assistance in Albert Lea / Freeborn County serving I-35 and I-90, with heavy-duty recovery, winch-outs, tire changes and fuel delivery.
